name_en: Small 🍠🍠🍠 High-body Backpack! 'Milk White' (Export Product) OHANEL🚩🚩🚩 25B Clover Series Backpack 🎒 If you like backpacks, don't miss this one 🌟 Square and structured shape; HAAs calfskin with a sand gold texture √ Clover medal pendant with a strong vintage feel! Overall style is very 'Academic' ❤️❤️ Rich vintage feel, sweet and cool yet retro! Whether carried by hand or on the shoulder, it's a styling essential! Size: 22x19.5x7cm
